name: ThemeProvider
description: A wrapper for next-themes ThemeProvider. This component handles theme switching (light/dark/system) via CSS classes. It is compatible with our manual CSS variable injection in SettingsContext because next-themes does not modify the inline 'style' attribute of the document element by default.

name: AppShell
description: AppShell handles the core layout and scaling isolation. It wraps the main content and sidebar in a zoomed container while keeping the BottomControlPanel and GoBackButton at a 1:1 scale.

name: usePOSLogic
description: Custom hook to manage Point of Sale (POS) logic. Handles product selection, cart management, and payment processing. @param initialProducts - List of products available for sale. @returns Object containing cart state, handlers, and current currency/tax settings.

name: useColorSampler
description: useColorSampler extracts dominant colors from an HTMLImageElement using Canvas. It returns an array of hex colors.

name: invoke
description: Redacts sensitive fields from arguments for secure logging. / function sanitizeArgs(args?: Record<string, any>): Record<string, any> | undefined { return args ? sanitize(args) : args; } /** A wrapper around Tauri's invoke that falls back to a mock implementation if the Tauri bridge is not available (e.g., when running in a standard browser).

name: convertFileSrc
description: A wrapper around Tauri's convertFileSrc that returns the source as-is in a non-Tauri environment.

name: mockInvoke
description: Mock implementation of Tauri's invoke. Intercepts commands and routes them to the appropriate handler.
